## What / why

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` / `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` / `cargo test` all pass
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-scope-and-scrub.sh` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/en/`, `docs/pt-br/`) if this changes install/setup/usage
- [ ] Financial/irreversible actions still require explicit user confirmation (no new autonomous path)

## Anything reviewers should focus on
